summary: DHS video built around a 'REMIGRATE' title card, with a VHS and glitch grain filter over aerial footage, black serif title cards, and clips of arrests and detention processing. It shows cuffed people and a person being detained on a street, paired with the tweet text 'Americans are the inheritors of the most incredible civilization that has ever existed. Our job is to defend it.'

script.scene: Aerial overhead shot of a single figure standing on pavement, shown through a heavy black and white VHS static and glitch grain filter.
Full-screen black title card with bold white serif text 'REMIGRATE' centered.
Sunlit street scene by a Mobil gas station: a man in a backwards cap and tan shirt being held and walked by a plainclothes agent (face blurred); a patrol vehicle tail-light in the foreground.
Motion-blurred whip-pan transition over grass and a roadway.
Interior of a processing facility: two men in handcuffs, one in a blue patterned shirt and one in a dark sweater, stand against a cinderblock wall by a doorway.

notable_text: On-screen title card: 'REMIGRATE'. Tweet: 'Americans are the inheritors of the most incredible civilization that has ever existed. Our job is to defend it.'
